payload.answer: Current architecture preference: Brain DB as canonical source, Cognee as rebuildable projection, Slack as strict intake. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performance model remain open questions.
payload.decision: Store as current: Brain DB is the source of truth, Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Treat Telegram and model choice as open questions, not decisions.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity mapping was provided; preserve ambiguity and avoid durable linking beyond the summarized systems.

payload.intent: Capture architecture preferences and open questions as durable memory, while preserving unresolved items.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
The cheapest model that still saturates performance has not been identified.

details: No superseded facts were promoted as current.

repair_options: If later confirmed, add Telegram as an intake agent or integration channel.
If benchmark results exist, replace the model-choice question with a concrete preferred model and rationale.
If architecture terminology changes, update Brain DB/Cognee/Slack roles accordingly.
